name: Terrestrial Brain
description: Syncs your Obsidian vault to Terrestrial Brain, an AI-powered second brain backed by Supabase. Notes are automatically ingested after a configurable delay and can be searched, analyzed, and enriched by AI agents via the Terrestrial Brain MCP server. AI-generated output (summaries, analyses, project plans) is delivered back into your vault via direct HTTP endpoints for review. Commands (Ctrl+P): 'Sync current note to Terrestrial Brain' — immediately sync the active note, bypassing the timer; 'Sync entire vault to Terrestrial Brain' — sync all non-excluded markdown files in the vault; 'Pull AI output from Terrestrial Brain' — manually check for and retrieve pending AI-generated content. Ribbon menu (brain icon): 'Sync note to Terrestrial Brain' — sync the active note; 'Pull AI Output from Terrestrial Brain' — check for pending AI output. Requires a deployed Terrestrial Brain endpoint (Supabase Edge Function) — see the project README for setup instructions. You can exclude a file from being synced by putting the exclude tag somewhere in there. The specific exclude tag can be configured in this plugin's settings and defaults to #tbExclude
author: Terrestrial Origin
